title: Dantzig-Wolfe Decomposition Algorithm Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the key steps and iterative process of the Dantzig-Wolfe Decomposition method for solving large-scale linear programming problems by breaking them into a master problem and subproblems.
relationships: Solve initial restricted master problem to get initial dual variables (prices)
Use prices to formulate and solve independent subproblems
Subproblems generate new columns (extreme points/rays) for master problem
Check if current solution is optimal (no negative reduced cost columns)
If not optimal, add new columns to master and iterate
Loop continues until optimality condition is met
